lore.english:
Taimanin. Gosha Academy student. Associated in Gosha's public security team. Is also a childhood friend of the team's captain, Homare Nao. At first glance seems like a dark child, but she hides her beauty. She likes to talk, but her voice is so quiet that she is often mistaken as a quiet child.

As a Soul artist, she uses "Death's Record" that enables her to read the information of a corpse's spirit by touching them. The information not only contains scientific data such as the cause of death and genetic information, but also includes occult data such as thoughts or memories that remain strongly in the corpses.

She is also an Itto-style swordman with high-speed sword drawing skills that is second to none.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Itto Style: Flash Strike[-]
skills.description:
Spins a sword behind their back to attack the enemy.
Inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:440102]%)[-] [&Weaken] to the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:440102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:440102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Itto Style: Soul Strike[-]
skills.description:
Quickly slashes the enemy 8 times and returns instantly.
Performs a [&Common_Word_Skill_ShieldPenetrate] attack.
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], inflicts [&ActiveSkillBlock].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:440203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Soul Art: Soul Resurrection[-]
skills.description: When the enemy dies, restores [&HP] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:440301]%[-] of the target's Max. [&HP].
